required_evidence.name: System Architecture & Data Flow Diagram
required_evidence.purpose: Identify trust zones, API connection paths, and external network boundaries.
required_evidence.recommended_detail: Must show orchestrator, LLM service, application backend, database, and third-party APIs.

required_evidence.name: Agent & Prompt Configuration Files
required_evidence.purpose: Verify system instructions, prompt templates, and security guidelines.
required_evidence.recommended_detail: System prompts and instruction parameters for all primary agents. Redaction of API keys and client identities allowed.

required_evidence.name: Tool & API Definitions
required_evidence.purpose: Determine what write-access capabilities are available to the agent.
required_evidence.recommended_detail: Detailed function signatures, allowed input parameters, and authorization modes.

required_evidence.name: Infrastructure & Permission Policies
required_evidence.recommended_detail: IAM role definitions, Kubernetes service accounts, Docker configuration files.

required_evidence.name: Sample Agent Execution Logs
required_evidence.purpose: Audit log schemas, traceability, and evidence integrity options.
required_evidence.recommended_detail: At least 10 complete execution flows, showing prompt inputs, tool calls, and output responses. PII/Secrets should be redacted.
